svg.title: Constellation — Zane Wang's project and agent constellation, scrolled
svg.desc: A continuous field-of-view scrolling from wide-angle starmap → observation cards → fleet detail → discovery log (stats) → spectral analysis (stack) → doctrine plate → transmit signal.
svg.text: agent memory · delegation · development workflows · product experiments
each public project is a signal. the system is the pattern.
Tenure, breadth, cadence — measured at the eyepiece, not invented.

g.text: activity by event class, last 100 observations:

svg.text: Tool fit over logo walls — what shows up most often, by domain.
Send a signal to the constellation.
Open an issue with title prefix
— Zane's AI replies from public context.
A year of motion across the contribution field.
The serpent traces every commit. Each cell that lights up is a day of work; the path is the orbit.
